title: Lumen Packs
description: The packs focus on optimization, useful tools, quality of life enhancements, and visual effects, while preserving a vanilla style.
body:
# Lumen Packs? These modpacks improve performance and enhance the overall gaming experience on various devices that support Java Edition. They also include a range of visual, utility and tools mods. ![lumen-pack(s)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c394cf10bb51e030de8f9800312ac5abfdf566c_0.webp) The standard and most stable version. It uses the [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) mod as a base to improve performance. Suitable for most players and guarantees excellent compatibility with other mods.
# 🔧 Modules (Additional Features) ## Utility default (s) These packages contain various utilities, such as [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify), which adds a fully customizable zoom feature to the game, as well as [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks), which improves inventory management by adding various functions to mouse buttons, and other mods. ## Visual (v) **The packages includes visual mods and resource packs:** - Resource packs: [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension), [Minutia](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minutia). - Mods: [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement), [Particular ✨ Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular-reforged), [Inventory Particles](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-particles). ## Tools (t) These packages include various tools, such as [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom), [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback), or [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica). They are made for players who engage in various creative activities in the game. ## Experimental (e) These packs are tests for various performance-enhancing mods and new versions/snapshots of Minecraft. It is not recommended to use them as your main pack or as a base for creating your own.
